allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {t['labels']['job']:20} up={t['health']:7}  last_scrape={t.get\('lastError','ok'\)[:60]}\\"\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]")

PowerShell($response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:9090/api/v1/targets" -Method Get; $response.data.activeTargets | ForEach-Object { "  job=$\($_.labels.job\)  health=$\($_.health\)  $\(if\($_.lastError\){'error='+$_.lastError.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(60,$_.lastError.Length\)\)}\)" })
